description_long: This rifle features a robust metallic receiver with a matte gray finish, complemented by wooden elements on the foregrip and pistol grip, giving it a classic yet utilitarian appearance. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a prominent muzzle device at the end, likely a suppressor, which extends the length of the weapon. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, with the front and rear sights both visible and aligned along the top of the receiver. The magazine is not externally visible, suggesting it may be internal or not modeled. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, with a focus on durability and straightforward functionality. The combination of metal and wood materials provides both structural integrity and ergonomic handling.
description: A classic rifle with a gray metal body, wooden grips, a long barrel with a suppressor, and iron sights. The design blends utilitarian metalwork with traditional wood accents.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle device and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the wooden foregrip, pistol grip, and the length of the suppressor, as well as the receiver's details.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the receiver, the rear sight, and the wooden stock area.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the same wooden and metal features, with the trigger and grip clearly visible.
